messages.content: We’re looking for remote helpdesk support for ~85 users (up to 100) with business-hours coverage, ticketing, and monthly billing as described. messages.speaker: seller
messages.content:
Yes—we can cover the full scope for up to 100 users (remote PC/Mac support, password resets, remote troubleshooting) with business-hours coverage, ticketing, and monthly billing.

Proposed price: $850/month.

SLA/response targets (business hours):
- P1 (major outage): response within 30 minutes
- P2 (user can’t work): response within 1 hour
- P3 (standard issues/requests): response within 4 business hours
Escalation: L1 helpdesk → L2 systems engineer → vendor escalation as needed; you’ll have an assigned service manager.

Onboarding: one-time $350 for environment intake (user list, access setup, ticketing portal, baseline documentation). Happy to review your current stack and confirm any exclusions (e.g., on-site support, after-hours) if needed.

messages.speaker: buyer
messages.content: Thanks for the details—SLA and escalation path look good. $850/mo is above our target for this scope. If you can do $675/month and waive the $350 onboarding fee, we can proceed this week. If onboarding must remain, we could do $675/month with onboarding capped at $150.

messages.speaker: seller
messages.content:

If you’re able to sign this week, I can also include the first month of service-management reporting (monthly KPI review + improvement recommendations) at no additional charge.

messages.content: Appreciate you moving. If you can do $725/month with the same SLAs and keep onboarding at $150, we can sign this week.
